hooks.command: printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"MANDATORY: Before writing code or giving reviews, consult rules/CLAUDE.md for the hierarchical development standards (common defaults + language-specific overrides). Path-scoped rules auto-load for matching files (e.g. test files load rules/typescript/testing/*); for coding-style, patterns, security, and hooks, read the relevant rules file proactively."}}'

printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SubagentStart","additionalContext":"MANDATORY: Before writing code or giving reviews, consult rules/CLAUDE.md for the hierarchical development standards (common defaults + language-specific overrides). Path-scoped rules auto-load for matching files (e.g. test files load rules/typescript/testing/*); for coding-style, patterns, security, and hooks, read the relevant rules file proactively."}}'

printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Before drafting the plan, consult docs/CLAUDE.md for architectural context (decisions, design, superpowers specs, roadmap) — follow links as needed."}}'

jq -r '.tool_input.skill // ""' | grep -qE '^superpowers:(brainstorming|writing-plans|executing-plans)$' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Before brainstorming/planning/execution, consult docs/CLAUDE.md for architectural context (decisions, design, superpowers specs, roadmap) — follow links as needed."}}' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.skill // ""' | grep -qE '^lifeline:(planner|loop|review|request-pr|upsource-review|approve-pr)$' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Before running Lifeline workflows, consult CLAUDE.md and README.md for project-local usage notes, and https://github.com/winoooops/lifeline for the plugin runbook."}}' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE 'gh +pr +create' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Opening a PR: if it relates to a Linear issue, put `Closes VIM-N` in the PR title/body so its status auto-moves (PR open -> In Progress, merge -> Done). See rules/common/linear-workflow.md."}}' || true

jq -r '.tool_name // ""' | grep -qE '(save|create|update)_(issue|comment|project|milestone)$' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Linear write (rules/common/linear-workflow.md): team key VIM; statuses Backlog -> Todo -> In Progress -> In Review -> Done, plus Canceled/Duplicate for dropped work; map GitHub wontfix -> Canceled."}}' || true
